_comment: P36 creator content-data monitors. Load: python3 tools/source_currency.py seed-sources canonical-sources/content-data-seed.json. SEO has the cleanest machine-readable signals (Google feeds). For platform specs the pattern is 'official page for the value, datestamped aggregator for the change-alarm'. Rate/seasonal are HTML-only: cache the numeric FACT with its publish date + source URL, never the page.
name: Google Search Central blog (RSS)
extraction_hint: core-update announcements and SEO best-practice changes; newest pubDate/guid is the signal; verified valid RSS 2.0

name: Google Search Status Dashboard (ranking/core updates)
extraction_hint: authoritative record of core/ranking-update rollouts with timestamps; exposes both RSS and a JSON history endpoint

name: Google Trends API (alpha)
extraction_hint: first sanctioned programmatic Trends access; JSON, consistent cross-request scaling, ~5yr window to T-2 days; monitor alpha->GA via the Search Central feed

name: Sprout Social social media image sizes guide (datestamped)
extraction_hint: self-describes 'Last Updated: <date>'; the change-alarm for platform specs -> when it moves, re-read the OFFICIAL platform help page to confirm before updating specs.json

name: Hootsuite social media image sizes guide (monthly datestamp)
extraction_hint: title carries [Month Year]; a 2-of-3 cross-check with Sprout to reduce single-source error; confirm against the official page

name: Influencer Marketing Hub benchmark report (annual)
extraction_hint: annual (~May), byline-date on the page; cache derived rate numbers WITH the report publish date + URL, never the page/tables (proprietary)

name: HypeAuditor State of Influencer Marketing (annual)
extraction_hint: first-party platform data; email-gated PDF; a new year-slug returning 200 is the freshness signal; cache facts + attribution only

name: Shopify retail holiday calendar (annual)
extraction_hint: year-stamped retail shopping dates; the DATES are public facts (freely cacheable); re-verify on the year flip in the title
